{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Thorngrass pill
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The thorngrass pill does not affect the spirit.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The thorngrass pill can cause tingling around injuries.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
